name: Chat transcript
when_to_use: 需要把一段对话作为交付物、案例或教学素材原样呈现时用它：适合客服记录、访谈摘录、AI 协作示例和情景模拟。需要真实输入、继续聊天或把回复传回 AI 时用聊天应用组件；只需引用一句话时用普通引文卡。
why_valuable: 聊天内容放进普通段落会丢失说话者、轮次和时间顺序；本组件用左右角色气泡、头像、署名、时间戳、已读状态和居中的系统消息稳定恢复一眼可读的会话节奏。

data_in.note: data.messages 是按时间顺序提供的消息序列；组件不排序。role='user' 右对齐，role='assistant' 左对齐，role='system' 渲染为居中事件。name/avatar 可覆盖默认显示；avatar 应为一个 emoji、首字母或很短的文本。text 使用纯文本并保留换行，status 仅显示为消息下方只读说明。

schema.title?: string —— 会话标题；省略时显示 “Conversation”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 参与者、渠道或上下文说明
schema.messages: {role:'user'|'assistant'|'system',text:string,name?:string,avatar?:string,timestamp?:string,status?:string}[] —— 按顺序消息；system 可省略 name/avatar，status 常用于 Delivered/Read 等只读状态

spec.note: 按消息增高，消息区最高 680px 后内部滚动；520px 以下气泡宽度放宽至 94%。无输入框、发送按钮或上行通道。

en.when_to_use: Use it when a conversation itself must be presented as a deliverable, case study, or teaching resource, including support logs, interview excerpts, AI collaboration examples, and scenario simulations. For real input, continued conversation, or sending replies back to AI, use a chat application component; for a single quoted sentence, use a regular quote card.
en.why_valuable: Putting chat content in ordinary paragraphs loses speakers, turns, and chronology. This component restores an immediately readable conversational rhythm with left/right role bubbles, avatars, bylines, timestamps, read states, and centered system messages.

data_in.note: data.messages is a sequence supplied in chronological order; the component does not sort it. role='user' aligns right, role='assistant' aligns left, and role='system' renders as a centered event. name/avatar may override the defaults; avatar should be an emoji, an initial, or very short text. text is plain text with line breaks preserved, and status appears only as a read-only note below the message.

schema.title?: string -- conversation title; displays "Conversation" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- participant, channel, or context note
schema.messages: {role:'user'|'assistant'|'system',text:string,name?:string,avatar?:string,timestamp?:string,status?:string}[] -- messages in order; system may omit name/avatar, and status is commonly used for read-only states such as Delivered/Read

spec.note: Height grows with the messages; after 680px, the message area scrolls internally. Below 520px, bubble width expands to 94%. There is no input, send button, or uplink.

example._why: 用一次真实感旅行规划对话展示 user/assistant 交替、头像、时间戳、多行文本、已读状态和系统消息，完整覆盖序列样式。

messages.name: Mina
messages.text: I have one free Saturday in Tokyo. Can we keep it walkable, food-focused, and under ¥15,000?

messages.name: Atlas
messages.text: Absolutely. I’d anchor the day around Kiyosumi-Shirakawa: coffee in the morning, the contemporary art museum, then a riverside walk toward Monzen-Nakacho.

messages.name: Mina
messages.text: Nice. I’d rather skip a formal lunch—can we graze and save room for dinner?

messages.name: Atlas
messages.text: That works well. Budget about ¥4,000 for bakeries and small plates, ¥1,500 for museum entry, and ¥7,000 for a relaxed izakaya dinner. That leaves a transit and contingency buffer.

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
